name: OpenDesign DESIGN.md Studio
description: Provides an IDE design-system surface inspired by OpenDesign for visually composing systems that emit DESIGN.md files.

standards.name: Design Tokens Community Group Format Module

capabilities.description: Renders a visual design-system studio for DESIGN.md files.
Adds the OpenDesign studio pane item when DESIGN.md is selected.
Exports visual design-system state to DESIGN.md.

renderers.label: OpenDesign Studio
renderers.description: Interactive DESIGN.md design-system renderer and review workspace.

paneItem.label: OpenDesign
paneItem.description: Open DESIGN.md in the OpenDesign studio pane.

permissions.reason: Reads and writes DESIGN.md when the user exports visual design-system changes.
